behavior_summary: LOTHLAY::look: When a player/actor inspects this item/NPC it sets up inspection state and makes the object 'speak' the name "Lothian" to the viewer using Item::bark. This is informational only.

LOTHLAY::gotHit: Implements a guarded one-time panic/summon reaction when the object is hit. It uses a per-item quantity/flag (Item::getQ / Item::setQ) to ensure the sequence runs only once, filters the attacker via Item::isNpc and Npc::isDead, and if conditions pass it barks a distress call, starts a camera quake, plays an SFX, spawns a helper (FREE::1C19), queries HP and direction, calls an internal behavior method (METHOD::0080) with hp and direction, then stops the quake.
notable_control_flow: A one-shot guard: Item::getQ is read at hit entry and Item::setQ is set to prevent repeated reactions.
Attacker filtering: calls to Item::isNpc and Npc::isDead gate whether the summon reaction proceeds (inferred to avoid responding to NPC or dead attackers).
Sequenced dramatics: Item::bark (shout) -> Camera::startQuake -> playSFX -> spawn (FREE::1C19) -> METHOD::0080 -> Camera::stopQuake.
Damage parameter is present in the gotHit signature but not used for branching in the observed code excerpt (inferred).
open_questions: Exact in-game event number that maps to LOTHLAY::gotHit in this script (inferred to be Event 6 but not canonical here).
Precise role and implementation of METHOD::0080 (appears to use hp and direction to drive spawned helper but exact effect is unknown).
Details of the spawn descriptor FREE::1C19 (what actor is spawned and its behavior beyond the call to METHOD::0080).
Whether Item::isNpc check intends to ignore NPC-origin attacks or to allow only NPC-origin attacks (inference favors ignoring NPC attackers).
Whether the 'damage' parameter is used elsewhere or in other code paths not shown here.

main_function.name: U8P_LOTHLAY::look
main_function.purpose: Handle a player/actor 'U8P_LOTHLAY::look' (examine) event for the object: prepare info state and make the item/NPC emit the name "Lothian" to the viewer via Item::bark.
entry_conditions: Event 0 (U8P_LOTHLAY::look) — triggered when an actor inspects/looks at the object (Avatar/player enters the U8P_LOTHLAY::look/trigger area).

function_map.name: U8P_LOTHLAY::look
function_map.role: Respond to 'U8P_LOTHLAY::look' event by setting object state and invoking Item::bark to display the name 'Lothian'.

function_map.name: U8P_LOTHLAY::gotHit
function_map.role: Respond to hit events: one-shot guard, attacker filtering, dramatized summon/panic sequence that spawns an ally and calls an internal method using hp and direction.

function_map.name: Item::bark
function_map.role: Display / emit short text message from an item/process to a player or process.

function_map.name: Item::getQ
function_map.role: Read per-item quantity/flag used as a one-shot guard.

function_map.name: Item::setQ
function_map.role: Set per-item quantity/flag to mark reaction as occurred.

function_map.name: Item::isNpc
function_map.role: Test whether an id refers to an NPC (used for attacker filtering).

function_map.name: Npc::isDead
function_map.role: Check whether an NPC is dead (used to avoid reacting to dead attackers).

function_map.name: Camera::startQuake
function_map.role: Begin camera quake effect to dramatize the shout-for-help sequence.

function_map.name: spawn (FREE::1C19)
function_map.role: Spawn a helper/ally actor instance in response to the call for help.

function_map.name: Npc::getHp
function_map.role: Query this NPC's current HP; used as a parameter for an internal behavior METHOD call.

function_map.name: Item::getDirFromItem
function_map.role: Compute direction from this item to a target id; used as direction arg for METHOD::0080.

function_map.name: U8P_LOTHLAY::playSFX
function_map.role: Play a sound effect accompanying the panic/summon sequence.

function_map.name: U8P_LOTHLAY::METHOD::0080
function_map.role: Internal method called with (hp, direction, local pointer) — likely configures movement/behavior/animation of spawned helper toward the attacker (inferred).

internal_calls.purpose: Pass NPC hp and direction plus a local pointer to drive behavior/targeting of the spawned helper (inferred).

external_calls.purpose: Make the inspected object emit the name 'Lothian' to the inspector/viewer.
Read a per-item 'once' flag to decide whether to run the panic/summon reaction.
Set the per-item flag so the reaction will not repeat.
Check whether the attacker id corresponds to an NPC to filter reactions.
Ensure the attacker is not dead before proceeding with the summon (avoid reacting to dead attackers).
Shout a Mountain King-style call for help to nearby players/actors.
Start a camera quake to dramatize the shout/summon event.
Play a sound effect to accompany the panic/summon sequence.
Spawn the helper/ally entity in response to the call for help.
Retrieve this NPC's hp to pass into METHOD::0080 (used to influence spawned helper behavior).
Compute direction from this object to the attacker/target to pass into METHOD::0080.
Stop the previously started camera quake after the reaction completes.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: LOTHLAY::look: When a player/actor inspects this item/NPC it sets up inspection state and makes the object 'speak' the name "Lothian" to the viewer using Item::bark. This is informational only.
